latHint: Think time - not a market stand.
pivHint: A market STALL is where you sell - but STALL also means to hold things up. What's the word?
winText: Time wasted. STALL was the pivot - market stand to wasting time.
lossText: DELAY - to hold up or postpone. STALL was the pivot: market STALL to a deliberate STALL.
